public interface MappedNode<T>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addItem(String name, T item)
    Adds a child item.
    void
    clearItems()
    Removes all children.
    T
    getItem(String name)
    Gets a single item (indexed child) by name.
    List<String>
    getItemNames()
    Gets a list of the names of all indexed children.
    List<T>
    getItems()
    Returns an array of all the child items.
    void
    insertItem(String name, T item, int atIndex)
    Inserts a child item.
    T
    removeItem(String name)
    Removes a child item by name and returns the deleted child or undefined if there wasn't one.

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      T getItem(String name)
      Gets a single item (indexed child) by name. Returns undefined if not found.
      Parameters:
      name -

    • getItems

      List<T> getItems()
      Returns an array of all the child items.

    • getItemNames

      List<String> getItemNames()
      Gets a list of the names of all indexed children.

    • addItem

      void addItem(String name, T item)
      Adds a child item.
      Parameters:
      name -
      item -

    • insertItem

      void insertItem(String name, T item, int atIndex)
      Inserts a child item.
      Parameters:
      name -
      item -
      atIndex -

    • removeItem

      T removeItem(String name)
      Removes a child item by name and returns the deleted child or undefined if there wasn't one.
      Parameters:
      name -

    • clearItems

      void clearItems()
      Removes all children.
